decision_log.decision: Intermittent failure pattern — 3 failures in 7 days with successes in between
decision_log.rationale: 3 failures scattered across the week with successful runs in between. Most recent run after the failure succeeded. Classic intermittent/transient pattern.

tool_calls.input: SELECT STATUS, CREATED_AT, EXECUTION_TIME, MESSAGE FROM DW.DATAOPS_DBT.DBT_RUN_RESULTS WHERE NAME = 'seller_event_day_listing_agg' AND CREATED_AT >= DATEADD(day, -7, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()) ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
